de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class PredicateAbstractionMergeContract

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.PredicateAbstractionMergeContract
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    MergeContract, SpecificationElement

    public class PredicateAbstractionMergeContract
extends java.lang.Object
implements MergeContract
    A MergeContract for the MergeWithPredicateAbstraction MergeProcedure.
